name: orgflow-ai
description: OrgFlow AI — role-based MERN + TypeScript platform with permission-aware RAG.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @orgflow/shared-types && npm run build -w @orgflow/api && npm run build -w @orgflow/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @orgflow/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @orgflow/api && npm run typecheck -w @orgflow/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @orgflow/api --if-present && npm run test -w @orgflow/web --if-present
scripts.gates: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
